bullets.text: Developed backend services integrating computer vision models for real-time CCTV analytics applications
Containerized 5+ backend inference services using Docker, reducing deployment setup time by 40%
Designed automated workflows using multi-agent systems to streamline data processing and decision pipelines
Set up and managed servers for computer vision model deployment, including environment configuration and inference pipeline setup
Configured GPU-based compute environments using Vast.ai to support scalable training and inference workloads for computer vision models
Collaborated with cross-functional engineering teams using Git and GitHub for code reviews and feature development
